# Agents-eval

> Agents-eval is a Multi-Agent System (MAS) evaluation framework using PydanticAI for generating and evaluating scientific paper reviews.

## Getting Started

- [README](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, quick start, and navigation
- [Contributing](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Development commands, coding standards, testing strategy

## Architecture & Design

- [Architecture](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): System design, technical decisions, architectural patterns
- [User Stories](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/UserStory.md): User workflows, acceptance criteria, success metrics
- [Roadmap](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/roadmap.md): Development roadmap and planned features

## Usage & Operations

- [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/best-practices/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and solutions

## Best Practices

- [MAS Design Principles](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/best-practices/mas-design-principles.md): Multi-agent system design guidance
- [MAS Security](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/best-practices/mas-security.md): Security practices for agent systems
- [Testing Strategy](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/best-practices/testing-strategy.md): Testing approach and guidelines
- [Python Best Practices](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/best-practices/python-best-practices.md): Python coding standards

## Optional

- [Security Advisories](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/security-advisories.md): Known security issues and mitigations
- [Agent Instructions](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/AGENTS.md): AI agent behavioral rules and compliance requirements
- [PeerRead Agent Usage](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/howtos/peerread-agent-usage.md): Operational guide for the evaluation pipeline
- [CC Adoption Plan](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-adoption-plan.md): Claude Code feature adoption roadmap
- [Agent Teams Orchestration](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-agent-teams-orchestration.md): Claude Code agent teams analysis
- [Ralph Enhancement Research](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-ralph-enhancement-research.md): Ralph loop gap analysis and external patterns
- [Skills Adoption](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-skills-adoption-analysis.md): Claude Code skills system adoption analysis
- [Sandboxing](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-sandboxing-analysis.md): Claude Code sandboxing and security analysis
- [Model & Provider Configuration](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-model-provider-configuration.md): LLM model and provider configuration
- [Plugin Packaging](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-plugin-packaging-research.md): Claude Code plugin packaging research
- [Memory System](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-memory-system-analysis.md): Claude Code memory system analysis
- [Cowork & Plugins Enterprise](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-cowork-plugins-enterprise-analysis.md): Enterprise Cowork and plugins analysis
- [Changelog Feature Scan](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-changelog-feature-scan.md): Claude Code changelog feature tracking
- [Remote Control](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-remote-control-analysis.md): Claude Code remote control analysis
- [Cloud Sessions](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-cloud-sessions-analysis.md): Claude Code cloud sessions (Code on the Web)
- [Fast Mode](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-fast-mode-analysis.md): Claude Code fast mode analysis
- [Chrome Extension](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-chrome-extension-analysis.md): Claude Code Chrome extension analysis
- [llms.txt Analysis](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-llms-txt-analysis.md): llms.txt specification and implementation analysis
- [Platform Documentation Index](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-platform-documentation-index.md): Claude platform documentation index
- [Remote Access Landscape](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/ClaudeCode/CC-remote-access-landscape.md): Remote access landscape analysis
- [Inference Providers](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/analysis/Inference-Providers.md): LLM provider comparison
- [Landscape: Agent Frameworks](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/landscape/landscape-agent-frameworks-infrastructure.md): Agent framework survey
- [Landscape: Evaluation Resources](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/landscape/landscape-evaluation-data-resources.md): Evaluation datasets and benchmarks
- [Landscape: Research Agents](https://github.com/qte77/Agents-eval/blob/main/docs/landscape/landscape-research-agents.md): Research agent landscape
